what_it_does: Records a channel attachment that links a design-source memory entry to an image asset located at image://design-source/capital-raise/p-21.
observations: target is an image:// URI pointing to design-source/capital-raise/p-21
No body content beyond the frontmatter
standouts: The target uses a custom image:// URI scheme
notes: A lightweight metadata stub that binds a design-source channel entry to a specific image asset.
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record an image attachment, which matches the content exactly.
intention_signals: To create a durable, discoverable record associating a design-source memory channel with a referenced image.
contribution: Provides a stable, typed attachment record that maps a channel memory entry to an image asset URI, supporting later retrieval and cross-referencing.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML metadata attachment file identifying an image attachment for the design-source channel, targeting image://design-source/capital-raise/p-21.
intention_for_embedding: To link a design-source channel memory entry to a specific image asset for traceability and retrieval.
